Regions.Name: RUINED OUTPOST
Regions.Description: The remains of a human base. Fires rage as an Explorator has crashed on a shelter.

Regions.Name: FRAGMENTED COAST
Regions.Description: Rolling hills with floating rocks and stone pillars. Only weak aliens roam the area.

Regions.Name: GLACIAL DESERT
Regions.Description: Vast, flat glaciers and cold winds that few creatures survive. Stronger aliens emerge.

Regions.Name: SCORCHED PLATEAU
Regions.Description: Enormous mesa with rough terrain and a warm climate. More aliens appear.

Regions.Name: RAINFOREST RAVINES
Regions.Description: Caverns filled with large trees that block sunlight. Exotic aliens start appearing.

Regions.Name: VOLATILE VOLCANOES
Regions.Description: Dead landscape of volcanoes and lava flows. Very strong aliens appear, exotic ones disappear.

Regions.Name: LUMINOUS SWAMP
Regions.Description: Swampy landscape full of bioluminescent life. Only exotic and weak aliens are present.

Regions.Name: RADIANT CASCADES
Regions.Description: Mountainous and snowy, strangely always night. Strong and exotic aliens rule the land.
